3.4.notes: New patterns added: require(eq caller (storage addr)) + setStorage(add/sub)(storage, literal) + stop. These cover OwnedCounter.increment and OwnedCounter.decrement which use access-controlled arithmetic storage mutations. SafeCounter.increment/decrement use checked arithmetic (safeAdd/safeSub with requireSomeUint) which requires safe-arithmetic/Option fragment grammar extensions beyond the current supported fragment. OwnedCounter.constructor/transferOwnership/isOwner use composition patterns (setStorageAddr without require, onlyOwner + setStorageAddr, local var binding + comparison + return bool) not yet in the grammar. These are deferred to future items (4.x or grammar extensions).
